'''鈭歸-k-ng-b''' ('''kawakngeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:excresce|excresce]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-k-ng-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:excresce|excresce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-k-ng-b
|-
! Lemma
| kawakngeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwakngeboko|thiwakngeboko]] || [[word:jiwakngeboko|jiwakngeboko]] || [[word:shiwakngeboko|shiwakngeboko]] || [[word:kiwakngeboko|kiwakngeboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
